title: Change Date Format when exporting from Charts?
excerpt: When we export data manually directly from a chart with the “…” menu, it formats the date column in a way excel doesn’t understand. Is there a way to change that Date field format when it exports from the chart? Where wo…

posts.author: cryptomark (Mark Berry)
posts.cookedHtml: When we export data manually directly from a chart with the “…” menu, it formats the date column in a way excel doesn’t understand. Is there a way to change that Date field format when it exports from the chart? Where would I do that?
